title: 扫码点餐
description_uz: «WeChat orqali skanerlaymanmi?» — Mijoz restoranda stoldagi QR-kodni skanerlab, ofitsiant yordamida taom buyurtma qiladi. Suhbat taom tanlash, achchiqlik darajasini so'rash, buyurtma berish va telefonda to'lashni mashq qiladi. Ovqat va to'lov mavzusidagi amaliy so'zlarga boy. Rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Сканировать через WeChat?» — Клиент в ресторане сканирует QR-код на столе и с помощью официанта делает заказ. Беседа тренирует выбор блюд, вопросы об остроте, оформление заказа и оплату в телефоне. Богата практичной лексикой о еде и оплате. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры.
description_en: «Do I scan it with WeChat?» — A customer scans the QR code on the table and orders with the waiter's help. The chat practices choosing dishes, asking about spiciness, placing the order, and paying on the phone. Rich in practical food and payment vocabulary. Great for role-play.

sentences.text_original: 好的，桌子上有二维码，您扫一下。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhuōzi shàng yǒu èrwéimǎ, nín sǎo yíxià.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, stol ustida QR-kod bor, skanerlab qo'ying.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, на столе есть QR-код, отсканируйте его.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, there's a QR code on the table — please scan it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do I scan it with WeChat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，微信和支付宝都可以。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, Wēixìn hé Zhīfùbǎo dōu kěyǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, WeChat ham, Alipay ham bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, можно и WeChat, и Alipay.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, both WeChat and Alipay work.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 扫了，手机上出现了菜单。
sentences.pinyin: Sǎo le, shǒujī shàng chūxiàn le càidān.
sentences.text_translation_en: I scanned it — the menu appeared on my phone.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 您选好菜，直接下单就行。
sentences.pinyin: Nín xuǎn hǎo cài, zhíjiē xiàdān jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Taomni tanlab, to'g'ridan-to'g'ri buyurtma bersangiz bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Выберите блюда и просто оформите заказ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Once you've chosen your dishes, just place the order directly.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这个菜下面有个辣椒，是辣的意思吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge cài xiàmiàn yǒu ge làjiāo, shì là de yìsi ma?
sentences.text_translation: Bu taomning tagida qalampir belgisi bor, achchiq degani-mi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Под этим блюдом есть перчик — это значит острое?
sentences.text_translation_en: This dish has a chili under it — does that mean it's spicy?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，一个辣椒是微辣，两个是很辣。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, yí ge làjiāo shì wēi là, liǎng ge shì hěn là.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, bitta qalampir — biroz achchiq, ikkitasi — juda achchiq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, один перчик — слегка острое, два — очень острое.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, one chili means mildly spicy, two means very spicy.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我要微辣的，再来一碗米饭。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ yào wēi là de, zài lái yì wǎn mǐfàn.
sentences.text_translation: Unda men biroz achchig'ini olaman, yana bir kosa guruch bering.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда я возьму слегка острое и ещё миску риса.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll have the mildly spicy one, plus a bowl of rice.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, nín hái yào hē de ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, would you like something to drink as well?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 再来一杯酸梅汤，就这些。
sentences.pinyin: Zài lái yì bēi suānméitāng, jiù zhèxiē.
sentences.text_translation: Yana bir stakan suanmeytang (nordon olxo'ri sharbati) bering, shu bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Add a cup of sour plum drink — that's all.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，您在手机上付款就行。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, nín zài shǒujī shàng fùkuǎn jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, you can just pay on your phone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fù hǎo le, duōjiǔ néng shàng cài?
sentences.text_translation_en: Paid — how long until the food comes?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Dàgài shí fēnzhōng, qǐng shāo děng.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan o'n daqiqa, biroz kutib turing.
sentences.text_translation_en: About ten minutes — please wait a moment.
sentences.speaker: B
